steps.title: Identify the research aim in the notes
steps.content: The task asks to emphasize “the aim of the research study.” In the notes, the key signal is “She wanted to know how ocean temperature affects where the whales forage for krill.” This is the research aim—the question Torres intended to answer, not what she found.

steps.title: Choose the answer that states this aim
steps.content: Choice B opens with “Torres sought to determine how ocean temperature affects where blue whales forage for krill”—this captures the research aim precisely. The other options emphasize findings or provide background detail instead of stating the investigative goal. That matches choice B — B is correct.
